top_signals.title: Bonds Climb as Oil Holds Near a Three-Month Low: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Bonds advanced ahead of the Federal Reserve’s policy decision, as a sharp recent slide in oil prices helped ease concerns of a renewed inflation shock.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Private equity bosses warn of AI threat to bets on law and accountancy
top_signals.summary: Buyout groups that have invested heavily in professional services face disruption from developing technology
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Drew $800 Million From Korean Investors on Trading Debut
top_signals.summary: South Korean retail investors snapped up almost $800 million of SpaceX shares on the stock’s first day of trading, underscoring strong demand for Elon Musk’s company after local investors were shut out from the world’s largest initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ex-Citi executive says bank sacked her after raising Trump concerns
top_signals.summary: Former employee claims in lawsuit that she identified issues with risk-management practices
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
